win_condition: When end-game city threshold is met, player who can power the most cities wins.
tiebreaker: If tied on powered cities, tied player with the most money wins.

categories.label: Cities Powered (Final Round)
categories.description: Primary victory metric: number of cities each player powers in final Bureaucracy.

categories.label: Money for Tiebreak
categories.description: Elektro held after final round; used only to break ties on cities powered.
